name: class_array_to_singular_multi_item
description: M3d CLAIMED: a class field (Pair{a:int,b:string}) with a MULTI-ITEM ARRAY [{a:1,b:x},{a:2,b:y}]. coerce_array_to_singular coerces each object into the class; both score 0, so pick_best takes the FIRST (index 0) -> Pair{a:1,b:x}. want live-captured from BAML final parse.
